reason: The migration rebaseline replaces the prior planning contract and temporarily keeps the active repo-pack coordinator large while it covers 62 item-level acceptance units, 12 task packets, canonical Factory schema and propagation compatibility, Factory-versus-product authority separation, historical-plan exclusion, and negative self-tests. Authority, runtime-pin, acceptance-text, task-ownership, and negative self-test validation have already moved into scripts/repo_pack_validation/; the coordinator remains below the Factory warning threshold and this exact-line shrink-only ceiling prevents unrelated growth while M0 completes decomposition.
compensating_validation: canonical Factory schemas and validate-repo-pack must pass
factoryd doctor must emit an architecture_budget_report with no unexcepted fail-level source
scripts/validate_repo_pack.py cannot grow beyond 803 lines; M0 follow-up work must preserve or reduce this ceiling
